mc-intro-3.title: Pre-Class Quiz
mc-intro-3.description: Test your baseline knowledge before starting the course. Your score will not affect your certificate.

questions.text: Endometriosis is a condition in which:
options: The uterine lining becomes abnormally thick
Tissue similar to the uterine lining grows outside the uterus
The ovaries develop multiple cysts
The uterus is positioned abnormally

questions.text: Which of the following is the most common symptom of endometriosis?
options: Frequent urination
Chronic fatigue only
Pelvic pain
Weight gain

questions.text: Approximately what percentage of women of reproductive age are affected by endometriosis?
options: About 10%

questions.text: The definitive method for diagnosing endometriosis is:
options: Ultrasound imaging
Blood test (CA-125)
Surgical visualization (laparoscopy)
MRI scan

questions.text: Endometriosis can affect fertility by:
options: Only by blocking the fallopian tubes
Only through hormonal imbalances
Through multiple mechanisms including inflammation, adhesions, and altered egg quality
It does not affect fertility

mc-intro-4.title: Pre-Class Questionnaire
mc-intro-4.description: Help us understand your background and expectations. There are no right or wrong answers.

questions.text: How familiar are you with endometriosis as a condition?
How confident do you feel discussing treatment options with your doctor?
How well do you understand what to expect from endometriosis surgery?
How important is it for you to understand the surgical process before your procedure?
How would you rate your current knowledge of post-operative recovery?

mc-feedback-2.title: Post-Class Questionnaire
mc-feedback-2.description: Share your feedback about the course. Your responses help us improve the learning experience.

questions.text: The course content was clear and easy to understand.
The instructor explained concepts effectively.
I feel more prepared for my surgical consultation after completing this course.
The course length and pacing were appropriate.
I would recommend this course to others considering endometriosis surgery.

mc-feedback-3.title: Post-Class Quiz
mc-feedback-3.description: Test your knowledge to earn your certificate of completion. You need 80% to pass.

questions.text: Which surgical approach is considered the gold standard for treating endometriosis?
options: Ablation (burning) of endometriosis lesions
Wide excision of endometriosis lesions
Hysterectomy
Hormonal suppression therapy

questions.text: What is the primary goal of Restorative Reproductive Medicine in treating endometriosis?
options: To suppress symptoms with long-term medication
To restore normal reproductive function while treating the disease
To recommend IVF as the first-line treatment
To delay surgery as long as possible

questions.text: When choosing a surgeon for endometriosis excision, which factor is most important?
options: The surgeon's proximity to your home
The surgeon's experience and specialization in excision surgery
Whether the surgeon accepts your insurance
The size of the surgical facility

questions.text: Which statement best describes the relationship between endometriosis staging and symptoms?
options: Higher stages always cause more severe symptoms
Stage I endometriosis never causes significant pain
The stage of endometriosis does not always correlate with symptom severity
Only Stage IV endometriosis affects fertility

questions.text: After excision surgery, what is an important part of long-term management?
options: No follow-up is needed if surgery was successful
Ongoing monitoring and a comprehensive treatment plan including hormonal support if needed
Immediate repeat surgery if any symptoms return
Avoiding all physical activity permanently
